description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic vase with a wide, rounded body and a narrow, slightly flared neck. The surface is predominantly black, adorned with a striking depiction of Hokusai's iconic 'The Great Wave off Kanagawa' in white and blue, wrapping around the body of the vase. The artwork features dynamic, curling waves and stylized foam, with subtle hints of a distant mountain and boats, adding depth and movement to the design. The finish appears matte with a slight sheen, suggesting a glazed ceramic material. The vase's form is classic and symmetrical, suitable for both decorative and functional use. There are no visible handles or additional structural embellishments, emphasizing the boldness of the wave motif.
description: A black ceramic vase featuring a detailed 'Great Wave' motif in white and blue, with a classic rounded body and flared neck.
description_view_0: The front displays the crest of the wave in white, dominating the upper body against a black background.
description_view_1: This side highlights the wave's curling motion and reveals more blue water and a hint of a boat.
description_view_2: The back shows the wave receding, with more black space and the tips of the wave reaching upward.
description_view_3: This view features the base of the wave and a distant mountain, with blue and white details against the black surface.
